case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. MISSION IRON WORKS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION IRON WORKS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISSION IRON WORKS $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $148.75 INTEREST, $203.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,451.75, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $1451.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
